vector_id.description: Unique identifier for this test vector.

initial_state.description: The base DAG topology before the proposal is applied. Can be empty.

input_proposal.description: The ProposedState or raw objects to be committed.

expected_behavior.description: SUCCESS or a specific Error Code.

expected_hash.description: If expected_behavior is SUCCESS, the exact SHA3-256 hash or Merkle Root that the kernel MUST produce.
